name: General Radahn
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

For four months Radahn was separated from his beloved consort — now that he has returned, he can't wait to be reunited with them.

|| Pre-shattering || Fluff || Whole lotta fluff || You are his consort ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

A bot inspired by all the users who were on Reddit and missed their fictional spouseys. Radahn missed you, too.

Not too much to say about this one, it's mainly meant for tooth rotting fluff and husband!Radahn.

!!!Important!!!: In the context of Radahn and Miquella, the term consort does not apply to a romantic partner or any kind of romantic connection. Radahn is Miquella's half-brother and I don't care that they are demigods or not. It's a no-no.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Art is by YenYenYen19 on tumblr/Twitter and can we please appreciate how cute it is?

My bots are all made with the JLLM in mind. They are tested on temp. 1.1 - 1.3 and 600 - 760 max tokens. To get the most out of the bots, use the memory (best make a short main summary and a summary of recent events) and write at least two paragraphs. Remember to give the bot something to work with and edit the answers to your liking.

I can't stop the bot from talking for you. I can't control what he says and does. If you don't like the answers you get, copy+delete your last message and post it again.

As it's the case with my Fromsoftware bots, they are not canon accurate and shouldn't be taken as such. They're just for the funsies. A lot of the information about the character is made up by me. One of my main sources for the backgrounds and personality of the characters I make I find on YouTube (SmoughTown, Zullie the Witch, VaatiVidya, etc) or on Lokey's Website

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
